name: Tangany
oneliner: BaFin-regulated digital-asset custodian with €3B+ under custody — the custody leg of Germany's tokenisation stack. Series A €10M.
finserv: BaFin crypto-custody licence; integrations with Cashlink and Finexity. Backed by Baader Bank, Elevator Ventures, Heliad Crypto Partners. €3B+ in digital assets under custody.
team: Munich fintech founders who understand they are infrastructure rather than a destination product. Baader Bank's strategic presence unlocks genuine banking distribution.
thesis: Custody is the quiet monopoly in tokenisation. Tangany is already the BaFin-licensed custodian behind a big chunk of Germany's eWpG tokenised securities — combined with Cashlink and 21X, it closes the German full-stack picture.
